hero.subtitle: Premium Hair Collection
hero.description: Luxury wigs, extensions, ponytails, and premium quality hair accessories. Handpicked for perfection in Sarajevo.

home.aboutText1: Eynna Hair Sarajevo is a premium hair brand dedicated to providing the highest quality wigs, extensions, and ponytails. Every product is carefully selected to guarantee a perfect look.
home.aboutText2: We use only the finest materials — from natural human hair to premium protein fibers. Every product undergoes strict quality controls.

testimonials.subtitle: Our Customers Say
testimonials.title: Customer Experiences
testimonials.t1: The quality of the wig is incredible! It looks completely natural and I receive compliments every day.
testimonials.t2: I ordered a ponytail and I am thrilled with the quality. The color matched my natural hair perfectly.
testimonials.t3: The extensions are gorgeous! Easy to install and they look fantastic. I will definitely be buying again.

about.subtitle: Our Story
about.title: About Us
about.storyText1: Eynna Hair Sarajevo was born from a passion for beauty and the desire for every woman to find the perfect hairstyle. From the very beginning, our goal has been to provide premium quality hair at affordable prices.
about.storyText2: Based in Sarajevo, we proudly serve customers from Bosnia and Herzegovina and all across Europe.
about.qualityText1: We use only the finest materials — from 100% natural human hair to advanced protein fibers that look and feel completely natural.
about.qualityText2: Every product undergoes strict quality controls. Our wigs feature mono-top construction and HD lace frontal for the most natural look.
about.value1Text: Only the best materials and finest craftsmanship for our products.
about.value2Text: An individual approach to every purchase and advice on choosing the perfect product.
about.value3Text: Your satisfaction is our priority. We are dedicated to every detail.

customWigs.subtitle: A wig made to your wish
customWigs.title: Custom Wigs
customWigs.description: We offer a custom wig creation service. Choose the length, color, texture, and hair type — we will create the perfect wig specially for you.
customWigs.step1Text: We discuss your wishes — length, color, texture, and style.
customWigs.step2Text: Our experts design the wig according to your specifications.
customWigs.step3Text: Handmade with premium materials for a perfect result.
customWigs.step4Text: Your wig is ready to wear — with a quality guarantee.

care.subtitle: Care Tips
care.title: Hair Care
care.description: Proper care will extend the lifespan of your hair products.
care.tip1Text: Wash gently with mild shampoo in cold or lukewarm water. Avoid rough scrubbing.
care.tip2Text: Let it air dry naturally on a wig stand. Avoid direct heat from a blow dryer.
care.tip3Text: Use low-temperature styling tools. For protein fiber, avoid temperatures above 180°C.
care.tip4Text: Store on a wig stand or in a hair net in a cool, dry place.
care.tip5Text: Use a wide-tooth comb. Start from the ends and work your way up to the roots.
care.tip6Text: Avoid sleeping with your wig on. Maintain it regularly for a longer lifespan.
